config:
{"recipients": "{{ doc.owner }}, inventory@example.com", "subject_override": "[Low Stock Alert] {{ doc.product_name or doc.name }} - Only {{ doc.actual_qty or doc.stock_qty }} remaining", "message": "

Low Stock Alert

The following product variant has fallen below the minimum stock threshold:

Product/Variant{{ doc.product_name or doc.variant_name or doc.name }}
SKU{{ doc.sku or doc.item_code or 'N/A' }}
Current Stock{{ doc.actual_qty or doc.stock_qty or 0 }}
Threshold10 units

Action Required: Please review and reorder inventory as needed.

"}
description: Sends an email alert when product variant stock falls below 10 units. Use with trigger event 'on_update' on PIM Product Variant or Stock Ledger Entry DocTypes.
usage_notes:
Configure this template for ECA Rules that monitor stock levels.

Suggested Trigger:
- DocType: PIM Product Variant, Stock Ledger Entry, or Bin
- Event: on_update, after_insert

Suggested Conditions:
- Field: actual_qty or stock_qty
- Operator: Less Than
- Value: 10

Customization:
- Update recipients with your inventory team emails
- Adjust threshold in the condition (10 is default)
- Modify message HTML as needed for branding

description: Creates an in-app system notification when an order is confirmed. Notifies the order owner with order summary and a link to view details.
usage_notes:
Configure this template for ECA Rules that trigger on order confirmation.

Suggested Trigger:
- DocType: Sales Order, Purchase Order, or custom Order DocType
- Event: on_submit, on_update

Suggested Conditions:
- Field: status
- Operator: Equals
- Value: Confirmed (or your confirmed status value)

OR use workflow_state if using Frappe Workflow.

Customization:
- Update for_user to notify specific roles or users
- Modify message content as needed
- Enable notify_on_email for email+notification

config: {"webhook_url": "https://your-integration-endpoint.example.com/api/price-updates", "webhook_method": "POST", "webhook_headers": "{\"Authorization\": \"Bearer YOUR_API_KEY\", \"X-Source\": \"TR-TradeHub-ECA\", \"X-Event-Type\": \"price_change\"}", "webhook_body": "{\"event\": \"price_updated\", \"timestamp\": \"{{ frappe.utils.now() }}\", \"product\": {\"doctype\": \"{{ doc.doctype }}\", \"name\": \"{{ doc.name }}\", \"product_code\": \"{{ doc.product_code or doc.item_code or doc.name }}\", \"product_name\": \"{{ doc.product_name or doc.item_name or doc.name }}\"},\"pricing\": {\"old_price\": \"{{ doc.get_doc_before_save().base_price if doc.get_doc_before_save() else 'N/A' }}\", \"new_price\": \"{{ doc.base_price or doc.price_list_rate or doc.rate }}\", \"currency\": \"{{ doc.currency or 'TRY' }}\", \"price_list\": \"{{ doc.price_list or 'Standard' }}\"},\"modified_by\": \"{{ doc.modified_by }}\", \"site\": \"{{ frappe.local.site }}\"}"}
description: Sends a webhook POST request to an external integration endpoint when product prices are updated. Includes old and new price values for synchronization with external systems.
usage_notes:
Configure this template for ECA Rules that sync price changes to external systems (marketplaces, POS, ERPs, etc.).

Suggested Trigger:
- DocType: PIM Product, Item Price, PIM Product Price, or your pricing DocType
- Event: on_update, after_insert

Suggested Conditions:
- Field: base_price or price_list_rate
- Operator: Changed (use the 'changed' operator if available)

IMPORTANT: Update the webhook_url and Authorization header with your actual integration endpoint and API key.

Customization:
- Modify webhook_body JSON structure to match your target API schema
- Add additional headers as required by your integration
- Consider adding retry logic via the ECA rule settings

config:
{"recipients": "compliance@example.com, {{ doc.owner }}", "cc_recipients": "admin@example.com", "subject_override": "[URGENT] Certificate Expiring Soon: {{ doc.certificate_name or doc.name }}", "message": "

Certificate Expiration Warning

The following certificate is approaching its expiration date and requires immediate attention:

Certificate Name{{ doc.certificate_name or doc.name }}
Certificate Number{{ doc.certificate_number or 'N/A' }}
Type{{ doc.certificate_type or doc.type or 'General' }}
Expiry Date{{ doc.expiry_date or doc.valid_until or 'Unknown' }}
Days Remaining{{ (doc.expiry_date - frappe.utils.today()).days if doc.expiry_date else 'N/A' }} days
Related Product{{ doc.product or doc.item or doc.reference_name or 'N/A' }}
Issuing Authority{{ doc.issuing_authority or doc.issuer or 'N/A' }}

Required Actions:

  1. Review the certificate details and initiate renewal process
  2. Contact the issuing authority if renewal is required
  3. Update the system once the new certificate is received
  4. Ensure affected products are updated with new certification

This is an automated notification from the TR TradeHub ECA system. Please do not reply to this email.

"}
description: Sends an email warning when compliance certificates are approaching expiration. Designed for use with scheduled (cron-triggered) ECA rules that check certificate validity dates.
usage_notes:
Configure this template for ECA Rules that monitor certificate expiration dates via scheduled triggers.

Suggested Trigger:
- Use a CRON schedule (e.g., daily at 9 AM: '0 9 * * *')
- DocType: Certificate, Compliance Document, or custom certificate DocType

Suggested Conditions (evaluated during cron run):
- Field: expiry_date
- Operator: Less Than or Equals
- Value: Use Jinja: {{ frappe.utils.add_days(frappe.utils.today(), 30) }}

This will trigger for certificates expiring within 30 days.

Customization:
- Update recipients with your compliance team emails
- Adjust the warning period (30 days) in the condition
- Modify the message HTML for your organization branding
- Add multiple rules for different warning periods (90, 60, 30, 14, 7 days)

template_name: Sync PIM Product to ERPNext Item
description: Syncs a PIM Product to an ERPNext Item when triggered. Creates a new Item if one doesn't exist, or updates the existing Item with the latest PIM Product data. Optionally syncs product variants as well.
usage_notes:
Configure this template for ECA Rules that sync PIM Products to ERPNext when products are approved, published, or updated.

Suggested Trigger:
- DocType: PIM Product
- Event: after_save, on_update

Suggested Conditions:
- Field: status
- Operator: Equals
- Value: Approved or Published

OR:
- Field: is_published
- Operator: Equals
- Value: 1

Configuration Options (in custom_args):
- create_if_missing: true/false - Whether to create a new ERPNext Item if one doesn't exist
- include_variants: true/false - Whether to also sync PIM Product Variants to ERPNext Item Variants

Notes:
- The sync maps PIM Product fields to ERPNext Item fields
- SKU or product_code is used as the Item code
- Barcodes (GTIN, EAN, UPC) are synced to Item Barcodes
- The erpnext_item_code and erpnext_last_sync fields on the PIM Product are updated after successful sync
